top_signals.title: Argentina Oil-Boom Province to Pitch First US Bond Since 2017
top_signals.summary: Argentina’s Neuquen province will pitch foreign investors in New York on its first new international bond in nearly a decade as the local government reaps the rewards of a shale oil boom, according to two people with direct knowledge of the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CryptoQuant says Strategy still needs disciplined bitcoin buying and selling framework
top_signals.summary: CryptoQuant said Michael Saylor's Strategy still needs still needs clearer rules for when to buy and sell bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Chip Stocks Slide Into Bear Market in AI Unwind: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A selloff in chipmakers gathered pace, driving the group that has led this year’s stock rally to a bear market on worries that the artificial-intelligence spending spree is becoming harder to justify.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
